message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F2F2F2
  BorderColor #333333
  RoundCorner 12
}

interface "PProject" as PProject
class "PBatch" as PBatch
class "PExecution" as PExecution
class "PStep" as PStep
class "POutputFile" as POutputFile
class "PInputFile" as PInputFile

PProject *-- PBatch
PBatch *-- PExecution

PExecution *-- PStep
PExecution *-- POutputFile
PExecution *-- PInputFile

POutputFile *-- PInputFile

@enduml
